summary: Applied the ADR 0122 Windmill operator access admin surface live on docker-runtime-lv3, repaired the bootstrap workspace identity and password-login contract, synced the raw app, and verified the private browser path end to end.

verification.observed: A live rerun of playbooks/windmill.yml limited to docker-runtime-lv3 completed successfully after the bootstrap-login and schedule-seeding fixes were committed.
GET /api/w/lv3/users/whoami returned superadmin_secret@windmill.dev with is_super_admin=true, role=admin, and groups=["all"].
GET /api/w/lv3/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin returned HTTP 200 with summary 'LV3 operator access admin console' and the expected operator-management runnables.
POST /api/auth/login with superadmin_secret@windmill.dev and the managed superadmin secret returned HTTP 200 and a session cookie.
The rendered /run/lv3-secrets/windmill/runtime.env on docker-runtime-lv3 now points DATABASE_URL at 10.10.10.50:5432 instead of database.example.com.

notes: The live integration exposed three Windmill-specific issues that are now addressed in repo automation: a missing bootstrap password-row contract for workspace whoami, a raw-app sync dependency on that workspace identity, and a Sunday cron placeholder that used 0 instead of Windmill's accepted 1-7 day-of-week range.

The live OpenBao instance was sealed during integration and had to be manually unsealed with the existing bootstrap keys before the successful converge replay. The repo already contains the audit-log ownership hardening that prevents the earlier restart regression, but unseal remains an operator action.
